summary: Phase 2.5-c (#252): backend runtime moved to backend/ with import rewrites, Alembic under backend/database/migrations, and documented src/ compatibility shims. API, auth, polling, ETL, TikTok, and repository test suites pass. No frontend or deploy-config scope included.

mappings.criterion: Backend entrypoints, workers, integrations, and database ownership align with the documented target boundary.
Python imports are rewritten consistently; no product app imports are introduced into backend code.
API factory, auth, polling, ETL, TikTok integration, and data repository tests pass after the migration.
Any temporary compatibility shims are explicitly documented and removed if unnecessary.
No frontend product implementation, shared package extraction, or deploy-domain work is included.

recommendations: Follow-up slice should point systemd juli-api.service at backend.api.api.main:app and remove src/ shims.
Update MODULE.md headers under backend/ai/ to reference backend paths instead of legacy src/modules/ml.
